creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
The Rhapsody and Darwin flavors of BSD are not mentioned.  Also, FreeBSD
3.0 is shown in two separate places.

Fix: 

http://people.freebsd.org/~trevor/doc/bsd-family-tree.diff
How-To-Repeat: 
Information on the origins of Darwin and Rhapsody is available at:
	http://www.apple.com/macosx/inside.html
	http://www.darwinfo.org/faq.shtml#lineage
	http://www.opensource.apple.com/projects/darwin/faq.html
